subcodes.first_line: O My spiritual friends! His honor David, the loving one, hath attained unto the praiseworthy station, laying his head upon the Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی من جناب داود ودود بمقام محمود وارد سر بر آستان نهاد و از تربت
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise and encouragement, @unity in diversity
